## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sales standup to discuss ongoing deals, upcoming events, and team alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tyler's bachelor party planning in Oregon highlights team bonding and upcoming time off](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Sales pipeline management crucial with multiple deals (Logic, Lovable, LightSource) potentially closing soon](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Tyler transitioning to lead more sales calls solo; team discussing strategies to support this shift](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Bubble deal requires careful handling of SOW edits and alignment with Marcel before the call](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

## Topics

### Upcoming Deals and Kickoffs

  - [Multiple deals (Logic, Lovable, LightSource) potentially closing, creating scheduling pressure for Sept 2nd and 8th](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Strategy to potentially move Logic's kickoff if needed, leveraging their new head of growth starting Sept 2nd](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Team considering using the 8th being "full" as leverage to push other deals to earlier/later dates](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Hyper Exponential confirmed for Sept 8th kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Tyler's Transition to Solo Sales Calls

  - [Tyler feeling confident leading 75%+ of calls, including all first calls and most second calls](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Team discussing strategies to support Tyler:](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Loom video reviews with Kyle for deal prep and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [Exploring alternative closing methods that play to Tyler's strengths](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Ensuring alignment with Marcel before key calls, especially during upcoming fundraising period](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### Bubble Deal SOW Edits

  - [Kyle made significant edits to Bubble's SOW, noting it's an unusually detailed request compared to other clients](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Key points:](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [SOW reads as if client is concerned about getting value from the strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [Some requested details are redundant or misaligned with typical GrowthX process](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [Team needs to clarify the strategy sprint's value and deliverables with the client](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Plan: Tyler to lead discussion with Marcel, presenting broader picture and key specifics before detailed questions](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

### Team Alignment and Communication

  - [Challenges in aligning with Marcel before calls due to his busy schedule](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Suggestions:](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [Develop a playbook for deal types, clarifying roles and prep work](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Use WhatsApp for urgent, key information sharing with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Better define which deals require Marcel's direct involvement](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to prepare for Bubble call, leading discussion with Marcel on SOW edits](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Implement Loom video review process with Kyle for upcoming deals (targeting Sept 3-5)](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Tyler to research Panda doc capabilities for collaborative editing of SOWs](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Team to consider updating SOW template to more clearly outline deliverables like AI-ready artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [Kyle to chat with Ben (LightSource CMO) at dinner about deal status and signing timeline](https://fathom.video/share/Ge_vLyaMy6XjeMNVZupMENYTa34oz3Gx?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
